<script is:inline>
  const getThemePreference = () => {
    if (typeof localStorage !== "undefined" && localStorage.getItem("theme")) {
      return localStorage.getItem("theme")
    }

    return window.matchMedia("(prefers-color-scheme: dark)").matches
      ? "dark"
      : "light"
  }

  const disableTransitionsTemporarily = () => {
    const style = document.createElement("style")

    style.appendChild(
      document.createTextNode(
        "*, *::before, *::after { transition: none !important; }"
      )
    )

    document.head.appendChild(style)

    return () => {
      void document.documentElement.offsetHeight

      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        style.remove()
      })
    }
  }

  const applyTheme = (theme, disableTransitions = false) => {
    const restoreTransitions = disableTransitions
      ? disableTransitionsTemporarily()
      : null

    document.documentElement.classList[theme === "dark" ? "add" : "remove"](
      "dark"
    )

    restoreTransitions?.()
  }

  window.__setTheme = (theme) => {
    applyTheme(theme, true)
  }

  applyTheme(getThemePreference())

  if (typeof localStorage !== "undefined") {
    const observer = new MutationObserver(() => {
      const isDark = document.documentElement.classList.contains("dark")
      localStorage.setItem("theme", isDark ? "dark" : "light")
    })

    observer.observe(document.documentElement, {
      attributes: true,
      attributeFilter: ["class"],
    })
  }
</script>

export { default as ThemeToggle } from "./theme-toggle.astro"
export { default as ThemeToggleProvider } from "./theme-toggle-provider.astro"
